summary: Full backend + frontend testing of MTSS WellTrack platform. All 13 backend API tests pass. All frontend pages load correctly with proper data. Auth via session_token cookie works correctly.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom-right corner content on smaller viewports - minor

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend routes use /meeting and /radar, not /meeting-prep and /class-risk-radar. The sidebar nav labels say 'MTSS Meeting' and 'Class Risk Radar' which match visually but the URL paths are shortened. No bug, just noting for documentation.
console warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> in ClassroomRadarPage - minor HTML hydration warning but page renders fine
/api/students/summary returns 'mtss_tier' field not 'tier' - field naming is consistent throughout but slightly non-standard
seed_data_creation: None - demo data was already seeded (32 students, 4 classes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session token 'test_session_admin_a73014c495be433d80bed4706726adb3' is valid admin. Frontend routes: /dashboard, /screening, /students, /students/:id, /radar (Class Risk Radar), /analytics, /interventions, /alerts, /meeting (MTSS Meeting), /reports, /settings. CSV export endpoints: /api/reports/students-csv, /api/reports/tier-summary-csv, /api/reports/screening-csv, /api/reports/interventions-csv. All APIs and pages working.
